\tzpentry{ID3354}{Quantum Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3354 introduces Quantum Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} E_J &= \frac{ \hbar I_c}{2e} \\ E_C &= \frac{e^2}{2C} \end{align}
